/usr/bin/cc -g -Wl,--enable-auto-import "CMakeFiles/test_posix-mman.dir/tests/test_madvise.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-mman.dir/tests/test_main.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-mman.dir/tests/test_mlock.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-mman.dir/tests/test_mlockall.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-mman.dir/tests/test_mman.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-mman.dir/tests/test_mmap.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-mman.dir/tests/test_mprotect.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-mman.dir/tests/test_msync.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-mman.dir/tests/test_munlock.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-mman.dir/tests/test_munlockall.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-mman.dir/tests/test_munmap.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test_posix-mman.dir/tests/test_shm.c.o" -o test_posix-mman.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libtest_posix-mman.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0  libposix-mman.a
